goals: Store personal preferences and teaching context for future reference
Search for previously stored preferences to verify retrieval
List all stored memories to review current memory state
Delete an outdated or incorrect memory entry

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and curious. Explores new tools systematically while maintaining professional demeanor. Values efficient information retrieval and organized knowledge management.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Deep understanding of AI concepts and tech industry tools. Familiar with memory systems and semantic search but may not know specific implementation details of mem0. Willing to experiment with new tools to enhance productivity.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored preferences, verified retrieval works, reviewed all stored memories, and cleaned up any outdated entries.
